rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Deeming The Deposition Of Cahills Pmk Cor Concluded And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 13, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Cahill Construction Services, Inc.¿s motion for protective order deeming the deposition of Cahill¿s person most knowledgeable concluded and request for sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 10:00am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
